posts.author: TomMitchell (Tom Mitchell)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think it would be really good to be able to enable / disable AI features on boards within monday.com from and administrator level, it would also be good to be able to limit usage and report on AI usage within boards.

Working in a healthcare environment means that we have very strict guidance on how AI can be used. Being able to control the permissions and functionality across the account and individual boards would be of great benefit!
